title: Lead Revenue Manager at Jubilant FoodWorks

jsonLd.title: Lead Revenue Manager at Jubilant FoodWorks
jsonLd.description:
Jubilant FoodWorks is actively seeking a talented and motivated Revenue Manager to join our dynamic team in Mumbai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Jubilant FoodWorks:
Jubilant FoodWorks is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Food Safety

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jubilant FoodWorks!
